headline: Zerostack Implements Unix-Inspired Coding Agents in Pure Rust
lede: Zero overhead, high performance. Zerostack replaces bloated JavaScript runtimes with a 12MB Rust binary designed for native system integration.

headline: Mozilla Challenges UK Regulatory Attempts to Block VPN Access
lede: Regulators aim to age-gate the internet, but security tools shouldn't be the first line of fire. Mozilla argues that privacy is non-negotiable, even under the guise of safety.

headline: A Precision Voltmeter Clock Milled from Maple
lede: Engineering elegance meets analog aesthetics in this steam-bent enclosure. By bypassing traditional D-to-A converters, the project relies on the inertia of physical coils to track time.

headline: Hosting a Full Website on an 8-bit Microcontroller
lede: When limited silicon meets network ingenuity, legacy protocols find a second wind. Through WireGuard tunneling and SLIP connectivity, 8-bit hardware reclaims its place in the modern web.

headline: Colossus and the Dawn of Sentient Defense Systems
lede: In 1970, cinema peered into a future where computers dictate the terms of human peace. The film's reliance on real-world Control Data hardware remains a stark reminder of our enduring fear of autonomous logic.

headline: Zero-CPU Audio Synthesis on the Amiga 500
lede: Revisiting classic hardware requires finding the hidden seams in the machine's architecture. By offloading sound to the Copper coprocessor, programmers continue to push the Amiga beyond its theoretical limits.

headline: Malta Partners with OpenAI to Bring AI Literacy to Citizens
lede: A national experiment in workforce training begins with the integration of generative tools as a public utility. Access is conditioned upon completion of formal AI literacy coursework.

headline: Returning to Semantic HTML After Years of Tailwind
lede: The convenience of utility-first styling often masks the complexity of the cascade. By stripping away dependencies, developers rediscover the structural clarity of vanilla CSS.
pullquote: CSS is an evolving technology meant to be mastered rather than bypassed by utility frameworks.

headline: NVIDIA Releases SANA-WM for Long-Horizon Video Generation
lede: Simulation enters a new phase as world models learn to map camera trajectories into fluid 720p environments. This hybrid attention architecture offers a scalable window into synthetic, controllable reality.

headline: Modeling Pokémon Mechanics with Prolog Declarative Syntax
lede: Complex game-state relationships provide an ideal sandbox for testing logical rule-based systems. Beyond simple datasets, Prolog offers an expressive syntax for managing the intricate modifiers found in competitive gaming.
